---
title: "CorrelationRatio"
generated: true
description: "Correlation-ratio cost $1 -  eta^2$ (cross-modal; FSL lineage)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.register`](../nitrix-register.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.register._metric`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:CorrelationRatio -->
```python
class CorrelationRatio
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:CorrelationRatio -->
Correlation-ratio cost $1 - \eta^2$ (cross-modal; FSL lineage).

Scalar (BFGS) path.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

### Methods

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:CorrelationRatio.cost -->
```python
cost(warped: Float[Array, '*spatial'], fixed: Float[Array, '*spatial'], *, mask: Optional[Float[Array, '*spatial']] = None) -> Float[Array, '']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

Correlation-ratio cost $1 - \eta^2$.

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:CorrelationRatio.residual -->
```python
residual(warped: Float[Array, '*spatial'], fixed: Float[Array, '*spatial'], *, mask: Optional[Float[Array, '*spatial']] = None) -> Float[Array, ' m']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

Not defined: [`CorrelationRatio`](../nitrix-register/CorrelationRatio.qmd) is not least-squares.

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:CorrelationRatio.__init__ -->
```python
__init__(bins: int = 32, range_fixed: Optional[tuple[float, float]] = None) -> None
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:CorrelationRatio -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
